title: Girnarsoft Onboarding
subtitle: First-time user experience for professional decision-making tool.
problem_statement: Generic onboarding lacks clear value proposition for Indian professionals seeking decision support.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for professional decision support in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and zero-to-one product development.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.insight: Users need immediate understanding of product benefits.

pillars.title: Trust
pillars.insight: Professionals seek credible, reliable decision support.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Busy users want quick, seamless access to tools.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we clarify Girnarsoft's value proposition quickly?
How might we engage users beyond a generic login screen?
How might we integrate Indian market needs into onboarding?

points.name: Zoho Analytics
points.desc: Affordable, good for SMEs, less advanced.

points.name: Excel/Manual
points.desc: Basic analysis, high effort, prone to errors.

solution.name: Girnarsoft Vision
solution.desc: Intuitive, powerful decision support for professionals.

personas.name: Arjun Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, reliable data for strategic choices.
personas.bio: Arjun manages a large team, constantly making critical business decisions under pressure.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want tools to improve my analytical skills.
personas.bio: Priya is an ambitious analyst, eager to leverage technology for career growth.

points.action: Replace generic image with use-case specific visuals.
Integrate value proposition with login options.
Tailor content for Indian professional context.
Enhance 'Drag right' interaction for more feedback.

pivot.before: Generic, uninformative onboarding screen with placeholder text.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from generic 'Decision Enabler' to specific, localized value proposition and clear user benefits.
pivot.after: Engaging, context-rich onboarding that highlights Girnarsoft's unique value for Indian professionals.

annotations.title: Brand Identity
annotations.rationale: Girnarsoft logo is present but lacks strong visual connection to 'Decision Enabler'.

annotations.title: Value Proposition
annotations.rationale: 'Lorem ipsum' text needs replacement with clear, concise benefits.

annotations.title: Call to Action
annotations.rationale: 'Drag right to login G+' is functional but could offer more options.

data.finding: Placeholder text obscures actual product purpose.
Visuals (man in suit) are generic, not specific to Girnarsoft's brand.
Limited login options (G+) could prevent user access.
No alternative login methods or guest access visible.
